title: scirpus × triquetriformis
intro: Scirpus × triquetriformis, also known as Three-square sedge, is a hybrid species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. This aquatic plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion due to its rich content of fiber, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Scirpus × triquetriformis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Scirpus × triquetriformis include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
